mapper.insert: insert into student_reflection_evaluation (reflection_id, student_id, counselor_id, ai_analysis_id, score_details, total_score, grade, teacher_comment, is_ai_score_modified, evaluate_time, create_time, update_time) values (#{reflectionId}, #{studentId}, #{counselorId}, #{aiAnalysisId}, #{scoreDetails, typeHandler=com.gdmu.handler.JsonMapObjectTypeHandler}, #{totalScore}, #{grade}, #{teacherComment}, #{isAiScoreModified}, #{evaluateTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: select sre.*, su.id as su_id, su.name as su_name, su.student_user_id as su_student_user_id, su.grade as su_grade, tu.id as tu_id, tu.name as tu_name, tu.teacher_user_id as tu_teacher_user_id, aa.id as aa_id, aa.total_score as aa_total_score, aa.grade as aa_grade, aa.analysis_report as aa_analysis_report from student_reflection_evaluation sre left join student_users su on sre.student_id = su.id left join teacher_users tu on sre.counselor_id = tu.id left join student_reflection_ai_analysis aa on sre.ai_analysis_id = aa.id where sre.id = #{id}

select sre.*, su.id as su_id, su.name as su_name, su.student_user_id as su_student_user_id, su.grade as su_grade, tu.id as tu_id, tu.name as tu_name, tu.teacher_user_id as tu_teacher_user_id, aa.id as aa_id, aa.total_score as aa_total_score, aa.grade as aa_grade, aa.analysis_report as aa_analysis_report from student_reflection_evaluation sre left join student_users su on sre.student_id = su.id left join teacher_users tu on sre.counselor_id = tu.id left join student_reflection_ai_analysis aa on sre.ai_analysis_id = aa.id where sre.reflection_id = #{reflectionId}

select sre.*, su.id as su_id, su.name as su_name, su.student_user_id as su_student_user_id, su.grade as su_grade, tu.id as tu_id, tu.name as tu_name, tu.teacher_user_id as tu_teacher_user_id, aa.id as aa_id, aa.total_score as aa_total_score, aa.grade as aa_grade, aa.analysis_report as aa_analysis_report from student_reflection_evaluation sre left join student_users su on sre.student_id = su.id left join teacher_users tu on sre.counselor_id = tu.id left join student_reflection_ai_analysis aa on sre.ai_analysis_id = aa.id where sre.student_id = #{studentId} order by sre.evaluate_time desc limit 1

select sre.*, su.id as su_id, su.name as su_name, su.student_user_id as su_student_user_id, su.grade as su_grade, tu.id as tu_id, tu.name as tu_name, tu.teacher_user_id as tu_teacher_user_id, aa.id as aa_id, aa.total_score as aa_total_score, aa.grade as aa_grade, aa.analysis_report as aa_analysis_report from student_reflection_evaluation sre left join student_users su on sre.student_id = su.id left join teacher_users tu on sre.counselor_id = tu.id left join student_reflection_ai_analysis aa on sre.ai_analysis_id = aa.id where sre.counselor_id = #{counselorId} order by sre.evaluate_time desc
mapper.update:
update student_reflection_evaluation
ai_analysis_id = #{aiAnalysisId},
score_details = #{scoreDetails, typeHandler=com.gdmu.handler.JsonMapObjectTypeHandler},
total_score = #{totalScore},
grade = #{grade},
teacher_comment = #{teacherComment},
is_ai_score_modified = #{isAiScoreModified},
evaluate_time = #{evaluateTime},
update_time = #{updateTime}
where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select count(*) from student_reflection_evaluation where counselor_id = #{counselorId}
